claim: LlamaOCR extracts structured Markdown from images and documents using Llama 3.2 Vision 90B, preserving original formatting (tables, lists, spreadsheets) without external dependencies
actionable: Use LlamaOCR for document processing pipelines needing preserved structure; embed in RAG systems for multimodal document understanding without manual formatting recovery
source_title: LlamaOCR - Building your Own Private OCR System

claim: Vision model images consume 1,600-6,400 tokens depending on image size; Llama 3.2 90B costs $0.0120 per million tokens, Llama 3.2 11B costs $0.018 per million tokens
actionable: When selecting vision models for OCR, calculate token costs; smaller models (11B) may be preferable if performance is acceptable, reducing per-request costs significantly
source_title: LlamaOCR - Building your Own Private OCR System

claim: Running OCR multiple times (3x) through smaller model then using larger model as judge for consensus can fix hallucinations; hallucinations are often inconsistent (right 2/3 times, wrong 1/3)
actionable: For critical OCR tasks, run vision inference 3 times and use an LLM judge to pick consensus result; this reduces hallucination impact without expensive repeated human review
source_title: LlamaOCR - Building your Own Private OCR System

claim: Regions of Interest (ROI) approach: train object detection to locate regions then run OCR on those boxes separately to enforce structure and reduce hallucinations on complex documents
actionable: For structured documents (IDs, forms, tables), combine object detection with OCR; train ROI model once, then achieve reliable extraction with consistent structure
source_title: LlamaOCR - Building your Own Private OCR System

claim: LlamaOCR can run locally with Ollama using Llama 3.2 11B model without external API calls, preserving privacy for sensitive document processing
actionable: Deploy Ollama locally with Llama 3.2 11B for private OCR; this enables document processing without sending images to external services
source_title: LlamaOCR - Building your Own Private OCR System

claim: Multimodal RAG pipeline using vision models: run one pass for OCR, one pass for description, then combine both outputs with scraped web page text for comprehensive knowledge bases
actionable: Build multimodal RAG: extract text with OCR pass, extract context with description pass, merge with web scrape text; this improves retrieval for queries spanning images and text
source_title: LlamaOCR - Building your Own Private OCR System

claim: Vision models inconsistently extract structure from complex documents; test extensively on target document types before production use as stochastic outputs vary significantly
actionable: Before deploying vision models for OCR, test on 20+ representative documents from your domain; verify structure and accuracy are acceptable as results are non-deterministic
source_title: LlamaOCR - Building your Own Private OCR System
